# ============================================================
# Intelligent Coding Assistant - Environment Configuration
# ============================================================
# IMPORTANT: Do NOT commit this file to version control.
# ============================================================

# Runtime profile: dev / test / prod
SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=prod

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# MySQL Configuration
# ----------------------------------------------------------
MYSQL_HOST=mysql
MYSQL_PORT=3306
MYSQL_DB=coding_assistant
MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=lifei777
MYSQL_DATABASE=coding_assistant
MYSQL_USER=root
MYSQL_PASSWORD=lifei777

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# Redis Configuration
# ----------------------------------------------------------
REDIS_HOST=redis
REDIS_PORT=6379
REDIS_PASSWORD=

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# Neo4j Configuration
# ----------------------------------------------------------
NEO4J_URI=bolt://neo4j:7687
NEO4J_USER=neo4j
NEO4J_PASSWORD=neo4j123

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# JWT Configuration
# ----------------------------------------------------------
JWT_SECRET=mySecretKeyForJWTTokenGenerationThatIsLongEnough2024
JWT_EXPIRATION=86400000

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# LLM Configuration
# ----------------------------------------------------------
LLM_PROVIDER=openai
OPENAI_API_KEY=your-real-api-key-here
OPENAI_BASE_URL=https://api.deepseek.com
OPENAI_MODEL=deepseek-chat
CHATGLM_API_KEY=
CHATGLM_BASE_URL=
CHATGLM_MODEL=chatglm3-turbo
QWEN_API_KEY=
QWEN_BASE_URL=
QWEN_MODEL=qwen-turbo

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# App
# ----------------------------------------------------------
SERVER_PORT=8080
UPLOAD_DIR=./uploads
APP_LOG_LEVEL=info
